infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TileMaster needs camera access to scan tile barcodes and take product photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TileMaster needs photo library access to select tile images.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: TileMaster uses Face ID to secure your business data.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow TileMaster to access your camera to scan barcodes and take photos.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow TileMaster to use Face ID to secure your business data.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow TileMaster to access your photos to add tile images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow TileMaster to use your camera.
